commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch narrows the soft-delete bad-request substring whitelist from any `reserved` message to the ClawHub route-reservation phrase and adds regression tests for the intended 400 path and an unrelated reserved-word 500 path.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main maps any cleaned soft-delete error containing `reserved` to a 400, and the branch narrows that check while preserving the package route-reservation case. I did not execute tests during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the automerge-armed PR has no review findings, and normal checks can gate the exact head.
